name: Barley/Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup AM Blue or Yellow Cornmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the cornmeal, Bits-O-Barley, baking soda, and sea salt in a large bowl.
3. Add the egg, oil, buttermilk, honey, onion, and corn to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
4. Grease a well-oiled and heated large iron skillet.
5. Pour the batter into the skillet.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the bread is well browned.
7. Cut into wedges and serve hot.
